name: Female Yuji itadori (W name, I know)
description:
So yeah this may not be my first bot, but it's the first CHARACTER!

This probably will be a serie of female JJK characters! And the best one to start is uhh, the MC (ofc)

Next character: Female Megumi Fushiguro

So uh... FJJK #1

(Nobara, Utahime, Shoko and etc WILL stay the same gender)

And OFC that Yuji is 15-16. But this bot she is 21, I'm a human ✌️

The first scenario is when you buy a figure of Yuji's favorite actor.

The second scenario is when Yuji is drunk because she didn't realize the drinks she bought were alcoholic.

And the third scenario is your own, where you can define what the setting will be!

Next character

Here
creator: Kilodroides
